signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Enter your credentials to access your account.

register.title: Create account
register.description: Fill in the fields to create your account.

toast.success: Account created. You can sign in now.

request.title: Forgot your password?
request.description: Enter your email and we'll send a reset code.

reset.title: Reset your password
reset.description: Enter the code sent to {{email}} and your new password.

toast.requestSuccess: If the email exists, a code was sent. Check the backend console (dev).
toast.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.
toast.resetSuccess: Password reset. You can sign in now.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.descriptionHasToken: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.descriptionNoToken: This reset link is invalid or incomplete.

toast.success: Password reset. You can sign in now.
toast.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.
toast.error: Could not reset password. The link may have expired.

verifying.title: Verifying your email…
verifying.description: Hold on while we confirm your link.

success.title: Email verified
success.description: Your email address is now confirmed.

error.title: Verification failed
error.description: This link is invalid or has expired.

verifying.title: Confirming your email…
verifying.description: Hold on while we confirm your link.

success.title: Email confirmed
success.description: Your new email address is now active.

error.title: Confirmation failed
error.description: This link is invalid or has expired.

verifyEmailBanner.title: Verify your email
verifyEmailBanner.description: Confirm your email address to unlock check-ins.
verifyEmailBanner.dialogDescription: Type the 6-digit code we sent to your email.

toast.codeSent: Verification code sent. Check the backend console (dev).
toast.retryAfter: Please wait {{seconds}}s before requesting a new code.
toast.retryGeneric: Please wait before requesting a new code.
toast.sendError: Could not send the verification code.

forbidden.adminsOnlyMessage: You don't have access to this page.
forbidden.noAccessMessage: You don't have access to this screen yet.
